Canonical MEMORY.md is a STALE SNAPSHOT from approximately Session #225 — user-home reflects a much later state (~Session #269).

The sws_session221_decisions and t3_convergence_loops are present as canonical files and appear in canonical MEMORY.md as Project entries. User-home MEMORY.md does NOT list either — they are in the user-home dir but unlisted in user-home MEMORY.md. Size: 3959 bytes.
